description: Letter fragment. In Hebrew. Dating: end of the 10th or beginning of the 11th century. From Yosef b. Yiṣḥaq Ibn Abitur, in Spain (either Merida or Cordoba), probably to Shemarya b. Elḥanan, in Fustat. Greetings are sent on behalf of the writer’s sons Isaac and Mordechai, seeking the support of the recipient. Mentions Khalfa b. Taḥkemon. (Information from CUDL; see also Goitein's index card.)
